content.json:
# Replication Health — blog-castilho

Monitoramento detalhado da saúde da replicação ASR e Storage geo-replication.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "AzureSiteRecoveryReplicationStats"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| project TimeGenerated, Resource, RPO = RecoveryPointObjectiveInSeconds, Status = ReplicationHealthStatus_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: ASR — RPO por VM (últimas 24h)

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "AzureSiteRecoveryReplicationStats"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize MaxRPO = max(RecoveryPointObjectiveInSeconds) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| project TimeGenerated, MaxRPO_min = MaxRPO / 60
content.title: ASR — RPO Máximo ao Longo do Tempo (minutos)

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where MetricName == "GeoReplicationLag"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize P50 = percentile(Average, 50), P95 = percentile(Average, 95), Max = max(Average) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| project TimeGenerated, P50_s = P50, P95_s = P95, Max_s = Max
content.title: Storage — Lag de Replicação P50 / P95 / Max (segundos)
